name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve Legiflow
title: 'bug: '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

# Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

# Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

# Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

# Actual Behavior & Console Errors
Include error messages or console stack traces if available.

# Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

# Environment Details
- OS: [e.g. Windows, macOS]
- Browser [e.g. Chrome, Safari]
- Node version: [e.g. v20]
